<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aardhond (astrologie)]][[cdo:Muô-sáe̤k]][[de:Erde-Hund]][[hak:Vú-sut]][[ja:戊戌]][[ko:무술 (간지)]][[nds:Eer-Hund]][[vi:Mậu Tuất]][[za:Fouhswt]][[zh-min-nan:Bō͘-sut]][[zh-yue:戊戌]][[zh:戊戌]]

'''Yang Earth Dog also known as  戊戌''' (つちのえいぬ、ぼどのいぬ、ぼじゅつ) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle]].

It is the 35th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is [[Yin Fire Rooster]] and the following combination is [[Yin Earth Pig]]. In the system of [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|Yin-Yang Five Elements]], the [[Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ [[Tsuchinoe (戊)]] represents yang [[Earth (wuxing)|Earth (土)]], while the [[Earthly Branches|Twelve Earthly Branches]]’ [[Dog (zodiac)|Dog (戌)]] also represents yang [[Earth (wuxing)|Earth (土)]], and together they exhibit a relationship of [[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)]].

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Earth Dog (戊戌)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): wùxū
** Cantonese (Jyutping): mou6 seot1
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoe-inu
***Kunyomi 2: Bodo-no-inu
***Onyomi 1: boshu
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): musul (무술)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Mậu Tuất

==Years of Yang Earth Dog==
A year in the [[Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 38 when divided by 60 is a [[Year]] of Wuxu.
{| class="wikitable"
|+ '''Years of Wuxu'''
|-
! [[1st millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd millennium|2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd millennium|3rd Millennium]]
|-
|
* [[AD 38|38 AD]]
* [[AD 98|98 AD]]
* [[158|158 AD]]
* [[218|218 AD]]
* [[278|278 AD]]
* [[338|338 AD]]
* [[398|398 AD]]
* [[458|458 AD]]
* [[518|518 AD]]
* [[578|578 AD]]
* [[638|638 AD]]
* [[698|698 AD]]
* [[758|758 AD]]
* [[818|818 AD]]
* [[878|878 AD]]
* [[938|938 AD]]
* [[998|998 AD]]
|
* [[1058|1058 AD]]
* [[1118|1118 AD]]
* [[1178|1178 AD]]
* [[1238|1238 AD]]
* [[1298|1298 AD]]
* [[1358|1358 AD]]
* [[1418|1418 AD]]
* [[1478|1478 AD]]
* [[1538|1538 AD]]
* [[1598|1598 AD]]
* [[1658|1658 AD]]
* [[1718|1718 AD]]
* [[1778|1778 AD]]
* [[1838|1838 AD]]
* [[1898|1898 AD]]
* [[1958|1958 AD]]
|
* [[2018|2018 AD]]
* [[2078 AD]]
* [[22nd century|2138 AD]]
* [[22nd century|2198 AD]]
* [[23rd century|2258 AD]]
* [[24th century|2318 AD]]
* [[2378 AD]]
* [[2438 AD]]
* [[25th century|2498 AD]]
* [[2558 AD]]
* [[2618 AD]]
* [[2678 AD]]
* [[2738 AD]]
* [[2798 AD]]
* [[2858 AD]]
* [[2918 AD]]
* [[2978 AD]]
|}

=== Events ===
* In the 9th year of [[Tenpō]] ([[1838|1838 AD]]), [[Takano Chōei|Kōya Nagahide]] authored the work [[Bojutsu Yume Monogatari]].
* In the 24th year of [[Guangxu Era]] ([[1898|1898 AD]]), during the Qing dynasty, reforms and political upheaval known as the [[Hundred Days' Reform|Wuxu Reform]] and the [[Hundred Days' Reform]] took place.
==Months of Yang Earth Dog==
In a [[Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are [[Kanoto (辛)]] or [[Hinoe (丙)]]), the month of [[September]] becomes the [[Month]] of Wuxu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] or to a seasonal month (from [[Hanlu|Hanro]] until the day before [[Lidong|Rittō]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Earth Dog==
The [[Senjitsu]] for a Wuxu day is as follows.
=== Day Selection ===
A Wuxu day is the 6th day of [[Tenitsu-shin]].
== See Also ==
{{wikidata link|Q904922}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
